text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear Special Week and Tokai Teio<n>talking inside
the classroom. They<n>sound like they're having
fun...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And, and... the whole time, Suzuka<n>was so
cooool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know already. You just<n>can't get
enough of Suzuka, can you,<n>Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But she's just so great! I wanna be<n>an amazing
Umamusume just like<n>her!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm a little stuck on how to<n>actually do
that... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Maybe start by copying her? Heck, if<n>you do that,
maybe you'll end up like<n>her! You know, fake it
till you make it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Fake it till I make it... Okay, I'll give it a<n>try!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hohoho! What do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're totally off! Suzuka would<n>definitely strike
a more refined pose.<n>And she wouldn't laugh
like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-then how about this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah! That's more like it! And<n>jazz it up
with a Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Got it! One Teio Step coming<n>righ—wha?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I was just playing with ya! ♪ I think<n>you've got it,
though. Why don't you<n>try acting like Suzuka for
the rest of<n>the day?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: SPEEEEE! Perfect timing, mi amiga!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've found a super delicious taco<n>place, so let's
head over there on our<n>way home!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, hello there, El. Ehehe, you're as<n>hyper as
eve—Ahem. How are you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A delicious taco restaurant? That<n>sounds
intriguing.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's up with the way you're<n>talking?
Did you hit your head on the<n>bedpost this
morning or something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Tacos sound great. I'll go<n>with you, but
I'd like to be alone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're comin' with me, but you<n>want to be
alone? Qué?! What are<n>you talkin' abo—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I do want to go. I want to go<n>beyond that
delicious taco restaurant,<n>to a place no one has
ever seen<n>before.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You wanna go where?! What'sbeyond the taco place?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait! Spe?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week stubbornly keeps up<n>the Silence
Suzuka act for quite some<n>time.
